narrative:
Hubbard Ex Vill Sd (Trumbull) exempted village school district has 9,172 registered voters, with 57.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 17.0 percentage points.
